c.d: The app's interface and features should be intuitive and easy to navigate, even for users with limited experience in photo editing.
The app should offer a diverse selection of pre-designed templates and customizable layouts to suit different collage styles and photo arrangements.
The app should provide a range of editing tools, such as filters, cropping, text options, stickers, and background customization, to enhance the visual appeal of collages.
The app should allow users to easily share their collages on various social media platforms, such as Instagram, Facebook, and Twitter.
The app should offer a high degree of customization, allowing users to adjust border sizes, colors, aspect ratios, and other design elements to create unique collages.
The app should be stable and perform smoothly without crashing or lagging, even when working with large numbers of photos or high-resolution images.
The app should be affordable (preferably free with optional in-app purchases) and readily available on both iOS and Android platforms.
